Title: Dynamic Group Creation & Huntress Learner Sync Configuration for AFFG
Notes: After the initial configuration, an issue was identified where users were not syncing correctly as learners within Huntress SAT. Troubleshooting was performed to validate the Entra ID group membership, permissions granted to the Microsoft Graph integration, and the Huntress sync configuration. Once the issue was resolved, the learner sync was manually restarted and revalidated, confirming that only authorized, licensed users now successfully populate within Huntress SAT going forward.

Title: Setup Veeam 365 backup for client AFFG.
Notes: Created iSCSI target and LUN on QNAP NAS and presented it to the Veeam backup server. Configured iSCSI Initiator on Windows, connected to target, brought disk online, initialized (GPT), and formatted with ReFS for repository usage.

Title: Setup Veeam 365 backup for client AFFG.
Notes: Configured Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 by adding the tenant using modern authentication, creating a direct-attached backup repository on the mounted iSCSI volume, and configuring backup job (users/sites scope, schedule, and retention policy). Executed initial job run and validated successful backup completion and data write to repository.
